title: SEC ‘on the cusp’ of onchain tokenized securities exemption: Atkins
snippet: SEC Chair Paul Atkins says the SEC is “on the cusp” of an innovation exemption to enable compliant onchain trading of tokenized securities.

title: Bipartisan PACE Act looks to open Fed payment rails to nonbanks, draws crypto support

title: Kalshi mulls crypto expansion with perpetual futures launch: Report
snippet: According to reports, Kalshi plans to launch crypto perpetual futures, expanding beyond prediction markets as regulated derivatives offerings in the US continue to evolve.
